headline: GE Aerospace CEO: $210B Backlog and Historic Transatlantic Flight Proves Hybrid-Electric Aviation Is Coming
summary: GE Aerospace just flew a hybrid-electric testbed across the Atlantic to reach Farnborough, and CEO Larry Culp says it signals something much bigger coming for the next generation of commercial aircraft.

headline: BAE Systems batteries power hybrid-electric flight demo at Farnborough International Airshow
summary: BAE Systems (LON: BA) today announced a significant milestone in the development of sustainable aviation, with its advanced battery system powering the first flight test of GE Aerospace's hybrid-electric propulsion demonstrator aircraft during the Farnborough International Airshow.

headline: The Biggest Problem For GE Stock Is Also Its Biggest Opportunity
summary: The company's greatest challenge isn't finding new customers, it's keeping up with the ones it already has, and that's where the real upside could be hiding.

headline: IndiGo and CFM sign MOU paving the way to a record agreement for 1,000+ LEAP-1A engines
summary: Landmark deal includes creation of MRO capabilities for IndiGo’s growing fleet Signing Ceremony between IndiGo and CFM IndiGo, India’s largest airline and one of the world’s fastest-growing carriers, today announced it has signed an MoU (Memorandum of Understanding) with CFM International for an order of 1,000+ LEAP-1A engines to power 510 Airbus A320neo Family aircraft. headline: BETA Technologies Unveils MV250, Delivering Greater Range, Higher Speed, and Lower Costs for Military Logistics
summary: FARNBOROUGH, United Kingdom & SOUTH BURLINGTON, Vt., July 20, 2026--BETA Technologies (NYSE: BETA), an aerospace and defense company, today unveiled the MV250 at the Farnborough International Airshow. The MV250 is an autonomous hybrid-electric vertical takeoff and landing (VTOL) aircraft giving military operators greater range, higher speed, increased payload capability and lower operating costs for contested on- and off-airport logistics.
